mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_watchlist ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM user_watchlist WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_watchlist (user_id, symbol, sort_order, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{symbol}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_watchlist SET user_id = #{userId}, symbol = #{symbol}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
